texto: Everything from quarks to quasars, butterflies to brain cells, was created so that you and I might delight in the display of divine glory. We alone can glorify God by rejoicing in the beauty His creative handiwork and relishing the splendor of His-revelation in the Person and redemptive work of Jesus Christ.
explicacao: Citação de Kelly Monroe Kullberg sobre temas ligados a espiritualidade. “Everything from quarks to quasars, butterflies to brain cells, was created so that you and I migh…” articula espiritualidade, creation, glory-of-god em registro de espiritualidade, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e termino.
